protected_span_policy: Only the labelled inert literal statement may change; every other byte is protected.
protected_api_policy: All function names, parameters, signatures, and callable boundaries are protected.
behavior_oracle: Exact entry-unreachable inert-literal deletion preserves all reachable Rust behavior; parse and graph-delta validation remain mandatory.
independence_policy: Five variants share one design cluster and are never counted as independent confidence-bound samples; Wilson intervals use 200 positive and 200 hard-negative clusters.
